Trustee Janis Mitchell'S Petition For Settlement Of First Account And Report; For Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Continued To Jun-01-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Trustee Janis Mitchell'S Petition For Settlement Of First Account And Report; For Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Trust
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Continued To May-26-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Janis Mitchell. Mark Mitchell appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Mitchell presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the $10,000.00 he received and explained the circumstances, his Mother's condition, the need to provide home care and services he provided. Mr. Freedman argued that Mark was not entitled to the money or to claim mileage, stated that they do not have the benefit of any receipts and spoke of an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Mitchell stated that he was not objecting to the accounting. The matter was continued to May 26, 2011 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204 for an evidentiary hearing on the $10,000.00. Mr. Mitchell is to provide any receipts and or cancelled checks.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
